mission.title: flux: bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline exceeded`
mission.description: bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline exceeded` . Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current flux deployment
steps.description:
Verify your flux version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
helm list -n flux 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working flux installation.

steps.title: Review flux configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
kubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux
```
### Describe the bug

Good day colleagues!

Please check the log below:

```
flux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra="image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller" 
► connecting to

steps.title: Apply the fix for bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline
steps.description:
This PR updates the bootstrap health checks to include GitRepository resource, return the  Ready condition message on timeout, and log the error at the end for better visibility.

Before (showing only relevant output:
```
✔ reconciled sync configuration
◎ waiting for Kustomization
```yaml
flux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra="image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller" 
► connecting to https://gitlab.com
► cloning branch "main" from Git repository "https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git"
✔ cloned repository
► generating component manifests
✔ generated component manifests
✔ committed sync manifests to "main" ("0bb95c27ed1f4b4c538d865877e647222d8c8af9")
► pushing component manifests to "https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git"
► installing components in "flux-system" namespace
✔ installed components
✔ reconciled co
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
kubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR updates the bootstrap health checks to include GitRepository resource, return the  Ready condition message on timeout, and log the error at the end for better visibility.

Before (showing only relevant output:
```
✔ reconciled sync configuration
◎ waiting for Kustomization "flux-system/flux-system" to be reconciled
✗ client rate limiter Wait returned an error: context deadline exceeded
►
codeSnippets:
flux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra="image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller" 
► connecting to https://gitlab.com
► cloning branch "main" from Git repository "https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git"
✔ cloned repository
► generating component manifests
✔ generated component manifests
✔ committed sync manifests to "main" ("0bb95c27ed1f4b4c538d865877e647222d8c8af9")
► pushing component manifests to "https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git"
► installing components in "flux-system" namespace
✔ installed components
✔ reconciled components

✔ public key: ecdsa-sha2-nistp384 AAAAE2VjZHNhLXNoYTItbmlzdHAzODQAAAAIbmlzdHAzODQAAABhBH0A5BfvqdYEuj

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
